summary: Completed testing of PIX Payment interface and PDF generation features for Eleitora 360. All PIX APIs working correctly (22/22 backend tests passed). Frontend PIX tab with tabs, summary cards, and form modal working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in PIX expense dropdown.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render (Recharts library issue)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/pix/payment - Create PIX payment (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/pix/payments - List PIX payments (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/pix/payment/{id} - Get single PIX payment (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/pix/simulate-execution/{id} - Simulate PIX execution (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/pix/simulate-execution/{id} on already executed - Returns 400
Backend: GET /api/pix/bank-info - Bank info with BB integration status (200 OK)
Backend: PIX with CPF key type created successfully
Backend: PIX with CNPJ key type created successfully
Backend: PIX with EMAIL key type created successfully
Backend: PIX with PHONE key type created successfully
Backend: PIX with RANDOM key type created successfully
Backend: PIX linked to expense created successfully
Backend: PIX with invalid expense_id returns 404
Backend: GET /api/contracts/{id}/pdf - Generate PDF (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/contracts/{id}/download-signed-pdf - Returns 400 for unsigned contracts (correct behavior)
Backend: GET /api/reports/pdf - Generate reports PDF (200 OK)
Backend: Non-existent contract PDF returns 404
Frontend: Pagamentos page loads with two tabs (Pagamentos and PIX)
Frontend: PIX tab shows summary cards (Agendados, Executados, Total)
Frontend: PIX Agendados card shows R$ 175,50
Frontend: PIX Executados card shows R$ 1.650,00
Frontend: Total de PIX shows 9
Frontend: 'Novo PIX' button visible with Banco do Brasil badge
Frontend: Novo PIX modal opens with form fields
Frontend: PIX form fields present (recipient name, CPF, key, amount, description, date)
Frontend: PIX payment created via frontend and appears in table
Frontend: PIX table shows different statuses (Executado, Agendado, Processando)
Frontend: PIX table shows different key types (CPF, CNPJ, EMAIL, PHONE, RANDOM)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple PIX payments during testing for different key types (CPF, CNPJ, EMAIL, PHONE, RANDOM)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIX feature fully tested and working. Fixed one frontend bug in Pagamentos.jsx - SelectItem with empty string value in expense dropdown. The PIX Banco do Brasil integration is MOCKED (simulated). PDF generation endpoints working. Contracts need to be signed by both parties (locador and locatario) for download-signed-pdf to return the PDF.

fixes_applied.bug_fixed: SelectItem empty value error in PIX expense dropdown
fixes_applied.description: Changed SelectItem value from empty string '' to 'none' to fix React runtime error. The Select component was throwing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' error when opening the Novo PIX modal.
fixes_applied.line_changed: Line 702 - Changed value='' to value='none' with corresponding onValueChange handler update

mocked_apis.pix_banco_brasil: PIX Banco do Brasil integration is SIMULATED. Transaction IDs are generated locally. Real payments require BB API credentials configuration.

components: Novo PIX button with Banco do Brasil badge

fields: Tipo de Chave PIX (CPF, CNPJ, Email, Telefone, Aleatória)

pdf_generation.GET /api/contracts/{id}/download-signed-: Download signed PDF - Requires both signatures
